backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Inner Bloom app defining data types (Book, JournalEntry, UserProfile, MeditationSession, etc.) and mixing in storage and authorization modules, with a hardcoded list of meditation book recommendations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report specifying a single UI change: remove parenthetical text from Metta and IFS category titles in the quiz score heading on KnowledgePage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of components, pages, hooks, and configuration files in the Inner Bloom app.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md: Step-by-step runbook for redeploying the Inner Bloom app without code changes, covering prerequisites and standard redeploy steps.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_TROUBLESHOOTING.md: Structured troubleshooting template for diagnosing deployment failures across stages including dependency installation, backend/frontend deployment, Candid generation, and runtime errors.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Inner Bloom app that sets up the root div, favicon, a process.env compatibility shim, and global error/unhandled-rejection logging handlers.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, dashboard, pre-meditation, progress, journal, books, knowledge) and wraps the app in AppErrorBoundary, ThemeProvider, and ThemedToaster.
frontend/src/components/AmbientMusicCaro: Carousel component for selecting ambient music with audio preview, mute toggle, volume slider, swipe gesture support, and proper audio cleanup on unmount or track change.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors and displays a styled error screen with the error message, stack trace, component stack, and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/CloudSyncErrorBa: A dismissible alert banner component that displays cloud sync errors with customized messages based on error type (authorization, readiness, network, other) and a retry button.
frontend/src/components/DurationRangeInp: A slider input component for selecting a duration in minutes, displaying the current value and min/max labels.
frontend/src/components/FloatingNav.tsx: A fixed left-side floating navigation component with animated icon buttons for Journal, Progress, Books, and Knowledge routes, showing a tooltip label on hover.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A mobile hamburger menu (Sheet) providing theme toggling, authentication status display, logout functionality, and navigation back to the start page.
frontend/src/components/JournalFiltersDr: A journal filter panel with popover dropdowns for mood and energy selection, date range inputs, text search, favorites toggle, and an active filter count badge.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeBookPag: A paginated book-style content viewer supporting swipe gestures, keyboard arrow navigation, dot indicators, and smooth scroll-to-content on page change.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeCategor: A carousel component for selecting knowledge categories that supports touch swipe, keyboard arrow navigation, and circular navigation with center/adjacent card scaling effects.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeQuizDia: A dialog component that presents a shuffled multiple-choice quiz for a knowledge category, supporting back-navigation between questions and displaying a final score results screen.
frontend/src/components/lotus-r3f/LotusM: A Three.js/R3F component that renders an animated 3D lotus flower with 8 petals, a stem, and a center glow, driven by a LotusGrowthState for bloom, breathing, and opacity animations.
frontend/src/components/lotus-r3f/LotusP: A Three.js/R3F component that renders animated particles around the lotus, switching between chaotic Brownian motion and coherent orbital patterns based on the LotusGrowthState.
frontend/src/components/LotusCanvas.tsx: A full-screen canvas component that renders an animated lotus flower with floating particles, supporting multiple visual variants and intensity levels with theme-aware visibility adjustments.
frontend/src/components/MeditationCarous: A carousel component for selecting a meditation type (Mindfulness, Metta, Visualization, IFS, Quiz) with touch swipe support and circular navigation showing center and adjacent scaled cards.
frontend/src/components/MeditationGuideS: A step-by-step guide component for meditation instructions that supports dot navigation, directional slide animations, touch swipe, and renders an optional highlighted Benefits section per step.
frontend/src/components/MeditationTimerR: A canvas-based animated timer ring component that renders a circular progress arc with wave effects and a glowing edge indicator, supporting dark/light themes.
frontend/src/components/MeditationWaveFi: A canvas-based circular progress indicator that fills from bottom to top with an animated wave surface, supporting dark/light themes.
frontend/src/components/MobileBackButton: A mobile-only fixed back button that navigates to the dashboard, optionally calling a custom onBack handler before navigating.
frontend/src/components/PageBackgroundSh: A layout wrapper that provides a full-screen background with a LotusCanvas decoration, supporting variant and intensity props.
frontend/src/components/ProgressBowl.tsx: A canvas-based animated bowl component that fills with a liquid wave effect proportional to total meditation minutes, capped at 20,000 minutes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressLotusR3F: A Three.js/React Three Fiber component that renders a 3D lotus model with particles and auto-rotation, with growth state derived from total meditation minutes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressLotusSVG: An SVG-based animated lotus flower component whose petal layers open, glow, and breathe based on total meditation minutes and current streak.
frontend/src/components/QuizDialog.tsx: A multi-step quiz dialog that asks five questions to recommend a meditation type (mindfulness, metta, visualization, or IFS) based on the user's answers.
frontend/src/components/RitualSelectionM: A dialog modal that displays a user's saved meditation rituals (up to 5) using a carousel, with options to start or delete them. Shows an empty state message if no rituals exist.
frontend/src/components/SavedRitualsCaro: A swipeable/navigable carousel component for browsing saved meditation rituals, supporting touch gestures, keyboard navigation, and delete confirmation via an alert dialog.
frontend/src/components/SessionIndicator: A fixed UI indicator showing authentication status (guest or logged in) with buttons to return to the start page or log out, clearing relevant query caches on logout.
A reusable navigation bar component providing a back button, theme toggle, session indicator (desktop), and hamburger menu (mobile) for standard app pages.
frontend/src/components/ThemedToaster.ts: A thin wrapper around the Sonner Toaster component that renders it with a close button inside a container div.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudOperation.ts: A composition hook that wraps cloud write operations with automatic readiness-aware retry logic, using refs to always capture the latest actor and identity without triggering re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with ICP-specific configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useMeditationTimer.ts: Custom React hook that implements a countdown meditation timer with start, pause, reset, seek, and duration-change controls, firing an onComplete callback when time expires.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes TanStack Query hooks for all backend data operations (books, journal entries, meditation sessions, rituals, user profile), supporting both authenticated (ICP actor) and guest (localStorage) modes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Playfair Display font, defines OKLCH-based light/dark theme CSS variables, and declares custom utility animations (fade-in, breathe, glow, float, wave).
frontend/src/lib/bookData.ts: Static data file exporting a curated list of meditation and mindfulness book recommendations with titles, authors, descriptions, tags, and Amazon links.
frontend/src/lib/knowledgeContent.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static content for meditation technique educational pages, including multi-page articles and quiz questions for techniques like mindfulness.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Renders the active meditation session UI with a wave-fill timer, play/pause button, volume slider, and time seek slider. Accepts all session state and callbacks as props.
frontend/src/pages/BookRecommendationsPa: Displays a carousel of book recommendations with swipe/touch support, circular navigation, and stacked card animations. Pulls book data from a static data source.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page showing a meditation type carousel, a random daily quote, and Begin button that routes to pre-meditation or opens quiz/ritual modals based on selection.
frontend/src/pages/JournalPage.tsx: Journal page that lists meditation entries with filtering, inline editing, favorite toggling, deletion, and import/export functionality backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/KnowledgePage.tsx: Knowledge base page with a category carousel, paginated book-style content viewer, and per-category quiz with score persistence tied to the user's Internet Identity principal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component that displays the app's hero section with login via Internet Identity and guest mode options, redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PreMeditationPage.tsx: Pre-meditation setup page where users select mood, energy, meditation type, duration, and ambient sound before starting a session, with detailed step-by-step guides per meditation type.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Progress tracking page that displays meditation stats (streak, total minutes, rank) and supports exporting/importing progress data with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/utils/ambientSounds.ts: Defines the list of ambient sounds (id, name, icon, audio path) and provides helper functions to look up a sound by ID or retrieve its audio path.
frontend/src/utils/cloudSync.ts: Provides standardized cloud sync error codes, user-friendly messages, and a classifier function that maps raw backend errors to typed error categories.
frontend/src/utils/cloudSyncRetry.ts: Wraps cloud operations with automatic retry logic for readiness failures, and exports helpers to distinguish authorization errors from transient readiness errors.
frontend/src/utils/exportImport.ts: Provides serialization and deserialization utilities for exporting and importing user meditation data (journal entries, sessions, progress stats, rituals) as a versioned JSON format, with validation helpers for enum types like MeditationType, MoodState, and EnergyState.
Manages localStorage persistence of knowledge quiz scores, keyed by user principal ID or a guest key, and exposes a React hook for reading and saving scores tied to the current identity.
frontend/src/utils/lotusGrowthModel.ts: Calculates visual growth parameters for a lotus flower animation based on total meditation minutes (0–20,000), mapping progress through 24 phases to petal size, layer openness, vividness, glow, and particle behavior.
frontend/src/utils/meditationStorage.ts: Provides localStorage CRUD utilities for guest (unauthenticated) users to store and manage journal entries, progress data, and rituals, including a one-time migration from legacy storage keys.
frontend/src/utils/meditationType.ts: Validates and normalizes a string into a supported MeditationType enum value, falling back to mindfulness for unknown inputs and treating 'meta' as an alias for 'metta'.
frontend/src/utils/progressRanks.ts: Defines six rank tiers mapped to total meditation minutes (0–20,000+) and exports helper functions to get the current rank, next rank, minutes until next rank, and a formatted display string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), border radius, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request to remove parenthetical text from 'Metta' and 'IFS' category titles in the quiz score display heading on the KnowledgePage.
